description: Style Note Pared down to the basics, this kurta from alma is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories. Product Details Maroon  kurta with a mandarin collar and a cross over neckline, has four hook and button closure on the yoke, three fourth sleeves with piping on the cuffs, ethnic print on the yoke, piping all the way from the neckline to the hem and a vented hem Material and Care Blended cotton Machine wash Wash dark colours separately Dry in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
